nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 聖路易斯波托西州
nodes.summary: 聖路易斯波托西州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括白腹绿蜂鸟、Tamaulipas pygmy owl、White-crowned parrot等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Tamaulipas pygmy owl
nodes.summary: Tamaulipas pygmy owl（Tamaulipas pygmy owl，学名 Glaucidium sanchezi），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于聖路易斯波托西州，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Tamaulipas pygmy owl is endemic to Mexico where it is only found in the mountains of northeastern Mexico, in the northern part of the state of Hidalgo and the southeastern part of the state of San Luis Potosí. Its habitat is moist evergreen forest, montane forest and cloud forest at altitudes between about

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: However, at , it is slightly heavier than the long-whiskered owlet and the elf owl. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
